# Meditations

*[Marcus Aurelius](../philosophers/marcus-aurelius.md) · 175*

A personal notebook written in Greek by the emperor Marcus Aurelius, never meant for publication, in which he exhorts himself to live according to reason and to consent to the order of the cosmos. These private notes have become one of the great classics of Stoic spirituality.
